title: The Saddle Node
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing7: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing8: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
  ing4: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
  ing6: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to R+S. Ears react to B+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have R− AND B+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
Animation ingredients: ing[2, 3] (Nnp, nPp). Mix: R-.
